text.title: mcp-transport-stdio-vs-http Procedure
text.summary: Deterministic procedure converting a profile into a validated decision-record + emitted artifacts.

step.name: parse-profile
step.action: Load YAML; coerce types; reject if any required driver missing (multi_tenant, auth_required, client_targets).

step.name: walk-decision-tree
step.action: Apply 06-decision-tree.xml against drivers; collect the winning rule id at each branch.

step.name: enumerate-rejected
step.action: For each plausible alternative, write a one-sentence reason citing the disqualifying driver.

step.name: render-templates
step.action: Render the working template (code/config) under templates/ with concrete substitutions.

step.name: cross-check-failure-modes
step.action: Run each failure-mode detector from 03-failure-modes.xml; abort if any flags.

step.name: validate-and-emit
step.action: Run scripts/validate-mcp-transport-stdio-vs-http.py against 02-output-contract schema; emit JSON only on exit 0.
